seo.title: RainbowPaw | Pet Memorial & Cremation Services
seo.description: RainbowPaw provides respectful pet memorial and cremation services. We help families say goodbye with dignity and love.
seo.keywords: RainbowPaw, pet memorial, pet cremation, memorial keepsakes, Phnom Penh, Cambodia

hero.title: A Peaceful Farewell for Your Beloved Pet
hero.lead: RainbowPaw provides respectful pet memorial and cremation services. We help families say goodbye with dignity and love.
hero.compassionateDesc: Giving them the respect they deserve.

services.title: Our Services
services.pickupDesc: We provide respectful pickup service for your beloved pet.
services.cremationDesc: Your pet will be cremated individually with dignity and care.
services.keepsakesDesc: Keep your pet’s memory forever with personalized memorial items.

packages.title: Service Packages
packages.subtitle: Final pricing may vary by pet weight, pickup location, and special requests.

why.title: Why Families Choose RainbowPaw
why.desc: We understand pets are family. Our mission is to support people through one of life’s hardest moments.

shop.title: Memorial Shop
shop.subtitle: Products and services come from the supply side (merchant onboarding → listing → ordering → fulfillment → reviews).
shop.phonePlaceholder: Enter phone number for orders and lookup

memorial.title: Online Memorial
memorial.subtitle: Online memorial, online tribute, and shared memories — staying close to every remembrance.

items.name: Cloud Memorial Hall (Annual)
items.desc: Memorial page, anniversary reminders, and messages from family & friends.

items.name: Tribute Lantern (30 days)
items.desc: Light a lantern with warm wishes for 30 days.

items.name: Shared Photo Album
items.desc: Invite friends and family to upload photos and stories.

telegramAuth.title: Telegram Login
telegramAuth.subtitle: Supports both pet owners and merchants. Merchants can enter the merchant portal.

messages.pending: Merchant application submitted. Please wait for approval.

contact.title: Need Help Saying Goodbye?
contact.desc: We are here for you 24/7. Contact us anytime for support and service booking.
